dsl_rule.translation_notes: Correction stopping at 50% retracement interpreted as price rebounding from the 50th percentile (price_pos_20 >= 0.5) within a 20-bar range after being below it. Original trend resumption detected by price crossing above SMA_50. Exit when correction resumes (price falls below SMA_50), indicating trend failure.

backtest_rule.reason: Correction stopping at 50% retracement interpreted as price rebounding from the 50th percentile (price_pos_20 >= 0.5) within a 20-bar range after being below it. Original trend resumption detected by price crossing above SMA_50. Exit when correction resumes (price falls below SMA_50), indicating trend failure.

source_rule_text: When a correction in an uptrend stops at the 50% retracement level of the previous upsurge, enter a long trade as the original trend resumes.
